prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约44818名、21371名、46257名、37357名、31362名，整体呈波动中前移趋势。2021年因新高考首年出现异常高位次，202 3年再次出现较大后移，但2024–2025年连续两年显著前移，2025年基准位次约31362名，较2024年前移约5995名，显示报考热度回升；该校在江苏省物理类招生 计划2021年1322人、2022年1505人、2023年1662人、2024年1797人、2025年1676人、2026年1881人。2026年较2025年扩招205人（+12.2%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使 竞争略有缓解，但需结合考生规模综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，非985。软科中国大学排名2021年第47位、2022年第61位、2023年第58 位、2024年第52位、2025年第58位、2026年第58位，近年稳定在50–60名区间，属于全国百强中上游水平，在师范类院校中位居前列；2026年声誉评价为"明显负 面"，主要涉及师德师风事件（环境学院副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件等），2025年声誉同样为"明显负面"（3起师德师风事件）。抖音综合热度排名第69位，评价为" 一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业为高热推荐，师范/教育类专业为分化观望（推荐与劝退并存）。南京师范大学 物理类招生专业涵盖电气、计算机、能源动力等热门工科方向，同时保留师范类物理、化学、生物等基础学科，专业结构多元。江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约521000人，较2025 年（物理类+历史类合计约357675人）大幅增长约45.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，为本 省考生提供了就近就读的便利。该校在江苏省招生占比极高，本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用；负面舆情可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估中，教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语 言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，共5个学科获评A-/A等级。教育学、地理学等优势学科与该校师范类招生专业高度关联，对有志于从事教育行业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次前移趋势、2026年物理类扩招 12.2%、江苏省考生规模大幅增长约45.7%以及学校声誉负面舆情等因素，扩招和负面声誉倾向于使位次数字减小（更易进），但考生规模大幅增长带来的竞争加剧效应更为显著， 且近年位次持续前移表明报考热度上升。，结合考生规模激增和声誉负面双向修正，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约33863名，区间33363–3436 3名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 44,818, 21,371, 46,257, 37,357, and 31,362 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2021, there was an abnormally high ranking due to the first year of the new college entrance examination. In 2023, there was another significant backward shift, but in 2024–2025, there was a notable forward shift for two consecutive years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 31,362, a forward shift of about 5,995 compared to 2024, indicating a rebound in application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 1,322 in 2021, 1,505 in 2022, 1,662 in 2023, 1,797 in 2024, 1,676 in 2025, and 1,881 in 2026. In 2026, enrollment expanded by 205 students (+12.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly, but this needs to be assessed in conjunction with the overall candidate scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985 university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 47th in 2021, 61st in 2022, 58th in 2023, 52nd in 2024, 58th in 2025, and 58th in 2026, stabilizing in the 50–60 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, and among the top normal universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was "significantly negative," mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (the deputy dean of the School of Environment was dismissed for extramarital affairs, the mistaken display of the Rising Sun Flag incident, etc.). In 2025, the reputation was also "significantly negative" (3 teacher ethics incidents). Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, with an evaluation of "average," indicating medium-low exposure on short video platforms.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, while normal/education majors are in a wait-and-see state (both recommended and advised against). Nanjing Normal University's Physics Category enrollment majors include popular engineering directions such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Energy and Power Engineering, while retaining basic disciplines like Physics (Normal), Chemistry, and Biology, offering a diverse major structure. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (Physics Category + History Category total about 357,675), leading to a substantial expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, providing convenience for local candidates to study nearby. The university has an extremely high enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province, with strong willingness among local candidates to apply, and regional preferences support the ranking. Negative public opinion may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education (A), Marxist Theory (A), Geography (A), Chinese Language and Literature (A-), and Foreign Languages and Literature (A-) were rated A-/A. Advantageous disciplines such as Education and Geography are highly correlated with the university's normal enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to work in education.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical upward trend in rankings, the 12.2% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the significant increase of about 45.7% in the candidate scale in Jiangsu Province, and the negative reputation of the university, the expansion and negative reputation tend to decrease the ranking number (easier to enter), but the intensified competition effect due to the substantial increase in candidate scale is more significant, and the continuous upward trend in recent years indicates rising application enthusiasm. Combining the surge in candidate scale and the bidirectional correction of negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 33,863, with a range of 33,363–34,363.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 33,863, with a range of 33,363–34,363. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (33,363) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Double Degree programs, etc.). Candidates with rankings near the middle of the range (around 33,863) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near or above the upper limit of the range (34,363) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing basic normal disciplines. Physics Category candidates can focus on popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science and Technology, as well as advantageous majors at Nanjing Normal University like Geographical Science (A-level discipline).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category were approximately 10193, 3570, 10432, 4550, and 4889 respectively. In 2021 and 2023, there was a significant backward shift (both exceeding 10000), while in 2022 and 2024, there was a substantial forward shift to the 3500–4500 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4889, a backward shift of about 339 compared to 2024, showing a wide fluctuation pattern overall, stabilizing in the 4500–5000 range in recent two years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province: 760 in 2021, 800 in 2022, 877 in 2023, 808 in 2024, 806 in 2025, and 737 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 69 students (-8.6%), tightening the enrollment plan and theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university, with a stable ranking around 58 in the Soft Science rankings. Among normal universities, it is second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University, ranking among the top three nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', and the same for 2025. The consecutive two years of negative public opinion focus on teacher ethics incidents, which may affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 69th (average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. Disciplines: Education A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, Geography A, totaling 5 A-/A level disciplines. Among them, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, and Education are highly matched with History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, English, Ideological and Political Education, etc.), and the disciplinary strength has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity: Law is differentiated and wait-and-see, Teacher Training/Education is differentiated and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. Nanjing Normal University's History Category enrollment mainly includes teacher training, language, law, economics and management majors, with a major structure that is relatively friendly to liberal arts students. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025. The scale of History Category candidates is expected to increase from 97,088 to about 141,712 (+46.0%), significantly intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, the capital of Jiangsu Province, which has natural regional appeal to local History Category candidates. As a top liberal arts university in the province (the only strong liberal arts university among the 8 Project 211 universities in Nanjing), local liberal arts candidates have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference provides strong support for ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking fluctuating in the 4500–5000 range, the 8.6% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026, the significant increase of about 46.0% in the number of candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the negative reputation public opinion. The enrollment reduction and candidate scale increase both tend to push the ranking number higher (harder to enter), while the negative reputation has some offsetting effect. Combining the surge in candidate scale and the two-way correction of negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 4718, with a range of 4218–5218.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (4218) or better can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (double degree programs, Law, Accounting, Chinese Language, etc.); candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (4718) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors (Ideological and Political Education, Geographical Sciences, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., which are advantageous disciplines of Nanjing Normal University); candidates with rankings near or above the upper limit of the range (5218) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
